texto: Mankind must work continually to produce individual great human beings - this and nothing else is the task... for the question is this : How can your life, the individual life, retain the highest value, the deepest significance? Only by living for the good of the rarest and most valuable specimens.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Freiderich Nietzche que provoca sentido da existência e experiência vivida. Ao questionar “Mankind must work continually to produce individual great human beings - this and nothing else is…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre vida, genius, hero-worship, com foco em trabalho e hero-worship.
